name: Adobe Premiere
title: Adobe Premiere & Content Editing Systems
subtitle: Production-grade video editing — from raw footage to polished cut.
summary: Adobe Premiere Pro is the dominant pro video editor in 2026. This course covers the editor end-to-end: project setup, ingest and organization, cutting techniques, audio and color, motion graphics integration, export pipelines, and the editor's day-to-day workflow. Practical patterns from documentary, YouTube, social, narrative, and commercial editors.

modules.title: Premiere foundations
modules.objective: Set up projects right; ingest and organize footage; navigate the interface.

modules.title: Cutting and editing techniques
modules.objective: Master the timeline tools that pro editors live by.

lessons.title: The blade, ripple, and rolling edits
J-cuts, L-cuts, and the rhythm of dialogue

modules.title: Audio for video
modules.objective: Make your videos sound as good as they look.

lessons.title: Audio tracks, levels, and the mixer
Essential Sound panel — dialogue, music, ambience, SFX
Music and sync; the rhythm question

modules.title: Color and visual polish
modules.objective: Move beyond raw footage to a graded, intentional look.

lessons.title: Lumetri scopes and the color workflow
Primary correction: white balance, contrast, saturation
Titles, lower thirds, and Essential Graphics

modules.title: Workflow, integration, and export
modules.objective: Ship the finished video; integrate with the Adobe pipeline; sustain the editor's craft.

lessons.title: After Effects roundtripping via Dynamic Link
